summary: SQLAlchemy maps Python classes to SQL tables. Unit of Work tracks Session changes. Prevent N+1 queries with `joinedload()`.
oneLineSummary: SQLAlchemy ORM maps database tables directly to Python class models.

memoryTricks.trick: ORM = Python Classes in, SQL Tables out.

commonErrors.fix: Use joinedload() in select query options

preInterviewChecklist: Explain N+1 query problem and joinedload
